pathB.mind: Identify three things in the room that are physically 'high up' (a lamp, a shelf, a picture).
pathB.social: Listen to a song with a steady, uplifting beat and try to tap your finger to it.

sensationData.title: Shrinking
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel like you are shrinking. Making yourself smaller is a brilliant biological way to reduce your exposure to stress.
sensationData.blueprint: Protective Coiling. Your nervous system is signaling your muscles to pull inward toward your core (the 'fetal' tendency) to protect your vital organs from perceived social or emotional pressure.
sensationData.physicalSensation: Tightness in the chest, pulling the knees together, and tucking the chin. You feel 'small' inside your clothes.
sensationData.metaphor: A piece of wool shrinking in hot water; becoming tighter, denser, and less expansive.
sensationData.theImpulse: To cross your arms, hide your hands, and avoid taking up space in the room.
sensationData.superpower: Core Protection. You are masterfully guarding your most vulnerable parts. You are becoming a 'harder target' while you regroup.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel tight and small internally. Goal: Width Awareness.
pathA.body: Stretch your arms out wide to the sides, as if you were measuring a large box, then let them drop.
pathA.mind: Say silently: 'I am allowed to take up this much space.'
pathA.social: Recall a time you felt powerful or 'big' (e.g., after a workout or a success).

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside

pathB.mind: Count how many steps it would take to walk to the nearest wall.
pathB.social: Find one object in the room that looks 'solid' and 'unshakeable'. Focus on it for 10 seconds.

sensationData.title: Heavy
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel heavy or sad. Your body is lowering your pace so you can process loss or disappointment without crashing. You are not broken. Your system is taking a necessary pause to process and heal.
sensationData.blueprint: Metabolic conservation. Your system has slowed your heart rate and muscle tone to help you endure emotional weight, prioritizing internal 'processing' over external 'doing'.
sensationData.physicalSensation: A dragging weight in the limbs; a 'thick' feeling in the air; the sensation that your shoes are made of lead.
sensationData.metaphor: Walking through knee-deep water or wearing a lead vest. Every movement requires a conscious decision and extra fuel.
sensationData.theImpulse: To let the head hang, let the shoulders drop, move slowly, sigh often, and seek a soft place to land.
sensationData.superpower: Depth and grounding. This heaviness forces a pause that allows for deep metabolic and emotional processing. You are honoring what matters.
sensationData.generalGoal: Gentle lift. Lighten the load. Subtle unburdening.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel weighed down by a thick, internal cloud of sadness. Goal: Pull OUT.
pathA.body: Press palms flat on a table, push down firmly while lifting your chest slightly—feel the counterforce expand your posture.
pathA.mind: Texture Anchor. Silently name the exact texture of the fabric touching your skin right now (rough, soft, cool, fuzzy).
pathA.social: The Appreciation Scrap. Write down one thing you appreciate about a loved one on a scrap of paper.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels gray, like a distant movie you aren't part of. Goal: Pull IN.
pathB.body: Breath Wave. Place a hand on your chest and one on your belly. Feel the rise and fall of your breath for 5 cycles.
pathB.mind: Sensory Detail. Focus on one sound in the room and try to describe its 'shape' in your mind.
pathB.social: The Self-Hug. Give yourself a gentle, firm squeeze on the opposite arms or shoulders.

sensationData.title: Flat
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel flat or bored. Your brain is successfully recognizing a lack of meaningful stimulation and is prompting you to seek a better use of your energy. You are not lazy.
sensationData.blueprint: Under-stimulation response. Your nervous system has assessed the environment as lacking reward or novelty, causing a mild drop in energy to 'idle' mode.
sensationData.physicalSensation: A lack of 'spark' or appetite for any activity. Eyes feel slightly glazed, and your posture feels neutral but uninspired.
sensationData.metaphor: A car idling in a driveway, burning fuel without going anywhere, or a radio tuned to a station playing nothing but quiet static.
sensationData.theImpulse: To scroll mindlessly, seek quick dopamine (junk food), or disengage completely from the present moment.
sensationData.superpower: Catalyst for Change. Boredom is a biological signal that you are ready for more. It is the friction that prompts creativity and movement.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel apathetic and unmotivated. Goal: Pull OUT.
pathA.body: The Full-Body Stretch. Reach high for the ceiling, then drop to touch your toes to circulate blood flow.
pathA.mind: Novelty Search. Find one object you haven't looked at in a long time and notice three brand-new details about it.
pathA.social: The Curiosity Text. Send a quick message to a friend asking about a topic they love.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are mindlessly searching the external world for a dopamine hit. Goal: Pull IN.
pathB.body: The Heat Press. Rub your palms together for 5 seconds to create heat, then press them firmly against your chest.
pathB.mind: The Location Scan. Try to locate exactly where the feeling of 'flatness' lives in your body (e.g., throat, eyes).
pathB.social: The Laughter Memory. Recall a time you laughed until it hurt. Try to feel that laughter in your belly for 10 seconds.

sensationData.title: Retreating
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel like retreating. Your system is identifying a lack of safety and is proactively pulling back to prevent further exposure. You are not being 'difficult'; you are being protective.
sensationData.blueprint: Proactive withdrawal. A mild dorsal vagal shift where the body prepares to shut the gates before a full drain occurs.
sensationData.physicalSensation: A subtle pulling back in the chest, shoulders turning away from the center, and a desire to look at the exit.
sensationData.metaphor: The tide pulling away from the shore, leaving the sand exposed and quiet.
sensationData.theImpulse: To leave the room, stop the conversation, or physically turn your back to the environment.
sensationData.superpower: Boundaried Wisdom. You are noticing a lack of safety early, allowing you to choose your exit before your battery hits zero.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel the urge to hide within yourself. Goal: Internal Fortification.
pathA.body: Cross your arms and tuck your hands into your armpits. Feel the containment of your own frame.
pathA.mind: The Invisible Wall. Imagine a clear, solid glass wall between you and whatever feels 'too much'.
pathA.social: The No-Reply. Give yourself permission to not respond to the last thing said for 30 seconds.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside

pathB.social: Step back physically by one foot. Notice if that tiny bit of extra space feels better.

sensationData.title: Sagging

sensationData.blueprint: Mild postural release. Your sympathetic tone is fluctuating, allowing gravity to win the battle for your shoulders and chin.
sensationData.physicalSensation: Heavy eyelids, a slight drooping of the mouth, and a feeling like your clothes are heavier than usual.
sensationData.metaphor: A sail that has lost just enough wind to start fluttering and drooping, but the boat is still moving slowly.
sensationData.theImpulse: To lean your head on your hand, to slump in your chair, and to speak in a quieter, flatter tone.
sensationData.superpower: Micro-Rest. You are catching small pockets of recovery in the middle of the day, preventing a deeper collapse later.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel the 'glum' weight internally. Goal: Soft Upward Pulse.
pathA.body: Inhale and imagine the air filling the space between your shoulder blades, lifting them slightly.
pathA.mind: The Gentle Question. Ask yourself: 'What is one tiny thing that would feel slightly better right now?'
pathA.social: Visualize a safe person giving you a quick, encouraging nod.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside

pathB.mind: Find one object that has a bright color and notice how the light hits it.
pathB.social: The 'Small Talk' Pivot. If with someone, ask a very simple, low-stakes question like 'What's the weather like out there?'

sensationData.title: Dulled

sensationData.blueprint: Sensory muting. Your nervous system is slightly desensitizing your inputs to help you process a frustration without it feeling overwhelming.
sensationData.physicalSensation: A 'fuzzy' or muffled quality to sounds and colors. A feeling of being slightly behind a thin veil.
sensationData.metaphor: Looking through a window that has a layer of dust on it—the view is there, but the edges are soft and the colors are dim.
sensationData.theImpulse: To stop looking for the 'good' in things and to settle for a neutral, muted experience.
sensationData.superpower: Disappointment Buffer. You are giving your heart time to adjust to a change in plans by not feeling the full 'sting' all at once.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel internal 'static' or dullness. Goal: Sensory Sharpness.
pathA.body: Gently pinch the skin on the back of your hand. Notice the sharp, clear sensation of the touch.
pathA.mind: Name three specific things you can see that are exactly the same color.
pathA.social: Write one word that describes your disappointment on a piece of paper, then fold it up.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The environment feels uninteresting or flat. Goal: Detail Orienting.
pathB.body: Touch something cold (metal) and something warm (fabric) and notice the difference.
pathB.mind: Read the longest word you can find in the room.
pathB.social: Notice the texture of the person’s clothing sitting nearest to you.

sensationData.title: Sluggish
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel sluggish. Your system is moving slowly to carefully navigate a situation where you feel a bit guarded or uncertain.
sensationData.blueprint: High-viscosity movement. Your system is increasing the 'resistance' in your motor circuits to ensure you don't move faster than your current sense of safety allows.
sensationData.physicalSensation: Movement feels 'thick'. Your thoughts are moving at a slower tempo, and your reaction time feels slightly delayed.
sensationData.metaphor: An engine running with oil that is a bit too thick; it works, but every gear shift takes a bit more effort.
sensationData.theImpulse: To take the easiest path, to procrastinate, and to move in 'slow motion'.
sensationData.superpower: Deliberate Pace. By moving slowly, you are less likely to make a mistake or miss a subtle cue in your environment.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel 'slow' and heavy internally. Goal: Rhythmic Pulse.
pathA.body: Tap your fingers on your lap to the rhythm of a song you like.
pathA.mind: Count your steps if you move, or count your breaths if you stay still.
pathA.social: Text a friend a 'slow' animal emoji (🐢, 🦥) to acknowledge your current pace.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels like it's moving too fast. Goal: Synchronizing.
pathB.body: Follow a moving object with your eyes (a clock hand, a bird, a car) for 15 seconds.
pathB.mind: Describe one process happening in the room (e.g., 'The light is hitting the table').
pathB.social: Ask someone to repeat the last thing they said, just to give your brain time to catch up.

sensationData.title: Foggy
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel foggy. Apathy is a way of protecting yourself from 'caring' too much when you feel vulnerable or over-exposed.
sensationData.blueprint: Cognitive clouding. A mild dissociative state where the brain reduces the 'resolution' of your thoughts to prevent emotional overwhelm.
sensationData.physicalSensation: A 'cloud' behind the forehead. Difficulty finding specific words and a sense of being 'spaced out' while still awake.
sensationData.metaphor: Driving through a light mist; you can see the road, but the signs are hard to read until you are right on top of them.
sensationData.theImpulse: To shrug your shoulders, to say 'I don't know' or 'I don't care', and to avoid complex tasks.
sensationData.superpower: Mental Buffer. The fog acts like a soft cushion, preventing sharp thoughts or criticisms from landing too hard while you are feeling vulnerable.
sensationData.generalGoal: Clearing the windshield. One clear point.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel 'cloudy' and disconnected from your goals. Goal: Simple Clarity.
pathA.body: Take a deep breath and exhale with a loud 'Ha!' sound. Feel the air leave your lungs.
pathA.mind: The One-Task Anchor. Identify the single most simple thing you need to do next (e.g., 'Drink water').
pathA.social: State one true fact about your current environment out loud: 'The walls are white.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels blurry and uninteresting. Goal: Sharp Contrast.
pathB.body: Look at something very close (your palm) and then something very far away (out the window). Repeat 3 times.
pathB.mind: Find one object with a very sharp edge and trace it with your eyes.
pathB.social: Focus on the literal color of someone's eyes or hair for 5 seconds.

sensationData.title: Exploding
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel like you are exploding. Your system has detected a critical boundary violation or threat and has flooded your engine with every drop of high-octane fuel to ensure your survival.
sensationData.blueprint: Sympathetic Overload. The amygdala has hijacked the steering wheel, shutting down logic to provide maximum power to your limbs and lungs for an immediate fight-or-flight response.
sensationData.physicalSensation: Extreme heat in the face and chest; a racing heart that feels like it might burst; jaw muscles clenched; and an overwhelming urge to move or strike.
sensationData.metaphor: A solar flare or a steam boiler where the pressure gauge has hit the red line and the safety valve is screaming.
sensationData.theImpulse: To strike out, to scream at the top of your lungs, or to physically destroy the perceived obstacle in your path.
sensationData.superpower: Total Mobilization. You have access to a level of raw, explosive power that can move mountains. Your body is ready to protect you at any cost.
sensationData.generalGoal: Mechanical cooling. Discharge the heat immediately.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are consumed by internal heat and a pounding heart. Goal: Cool the Engine.
pathA.body: Physiological Sigh. Take two sharp inhales through the nose, followed by one long, slow exhale through the mouth. Repeat 5 times.
pathA.mind: Panoramic Vision. Stop fixating on one point. Look up and soften your gaze to take in the widest possible view of the room.
pathA.social: The Boundary Declaration. If safe, say out loud: 'I am running too hot to talk. I am stepping away for 5 minutes to reset.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are hyper-fixated on the trigger. Goal: Break the Lock.
pathB.body: Wall Push. Place both hands flat against a wall and push with 100% of your strength for 10 seconds. Feel the resistance in your muscles.
pathB.mind: Neutral Scanning. Find and name 5 blue objects in the room. Focus only on the color, not the objects themselves.
pathB.social: The Vent Valve. Ask a safe person: 'I have massive energy. Just listen to me vent for 60 seconds without trying to fix it.'

sensationData.title: Flooded
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel flooded. Your sensory inputs are overflowing, and your brain can no longer process the 'data'—it only sees 'danger'. You are not losing control; you are being overwhelmed by your own survival energy.
sensationData.blueprint: Sensory Saturation. Your nervous system is receiving more input than your 'processor' can handle, leading to a state of high-arousal confusion and panic.
sensationData.physicalSensation: Short, shallow breaths; a feeling of 'pins and needles' or tingling; dizziness; and a sense that the room is spinning or closing in.
sensationData.metaphor: A river that has burst its banks during a storm. The water is everywhere, and the current is too fast to stand in.
sensationData.theImpulse: To run blindly, to flail, to hyperventilate, and to find an immediate exit at any cost.
sensationData.superpower: Hyper-Vigilance. In this state, you are noticing everything. Your system is trying to find a gap in the chaos to lead you toward safety.
sensationData.generalGoal: Lowering the water level. Rhythmic anchoring.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are drowning in your own internal sensations. Goal: Grounding the Pulse.
pathA.body: Stomp your feet. Feel the impact of your soles hitting the ground. Rhythmic, steady, solid.
pathA.mind: The 5-4-3-2-1 Game. Name 5 things you see, 4 you can touch, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.
pathA.social: Hand-to-Chest. Place one hand on your forehead and one on your chest. Feel the 'container' of your own touch.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels loud, chaotic, and 'too much'. Goal: Narrowing the Focus.
pathB.body: Cup your hands around your eyes like goggles to limit your peripheral vision. Focus only on what is right in front of you.
pathB.mind: Focus on a single, repetitive sound in the room—a clock ticking or a fan humming.
pathB.social: Mirroring. Look at a safe person and try to match their slow, steady breathing pattern.

sensationData.title: Overload
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel overloaded. You have too many tabs open in your brain, and your system is beginning to 'glitch' under the pressure. You aren't failing; you are simply at maximum capacity.
sensationData.blueprint: Cognitive Congestion. High sympathetic arousal is forcing your brain to try and solve 10 problems at once, leading to a decrease in executive function and an increase in agitation.
sensationData.physicalSensation: Tightness across the forehead and temples; shallow breathing in the upper chest; and a 'buzzing' feeling in the brain that makes it hard to focus.
sensationData.metaphor: A switchboard where every single light is blinking at once and the wires are starting to smoke.
sensationData.theImpulse: To snap at anyone who speaks to you, to work faster and faster despite making mistakes, and to feel 'done' with everything.
sensationData.superpower: High-Speed Processing. Your brain is trying to be a super-computer. It is attempting to protect your future by solving every possible problem right now.
sensationData.generalGoal: Slowing the CPU. One thing at a time.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Your mind is a racing loop of 'must-dos'. Goal: Externalizing the List.
pathA.body: Stand up and shake your arms and legs vigorously for 30 seconds. Imagine shaking the 'stress' off your skin.
pathA.mind: Brain Dump. Write down the 3 most urgent things on a piece of paper, then put the pen down.
pathA.social: Declare the Limit. Tell a safe person: 'I am at my limit. I need 10 minutes of silence to process.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The environment feels like a checklist of demands. Goal: Creating a Sanctuary.
pathB.body: Put on noise-canceling headphones or earplugs to shut out the auditory 'noise'.
pathB.mind: Focus entirely on the feeling of your feet inside your shoes for one minute.
pathB.social: Ask for a 'No-Ask Zone'. Tell those around you that you cannot answer any questions for the next hour.

sensationData.title: Twitchy
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel twitchy. You have an enormous amount of 'mobilization' energy ready to go, but nowhere to point it. You are like a racehorse behind the gate.
sensationData.blueprint: Unchanneled Sympathetic Energy. Your body has dumped adrenaline into your system to prepare for action, but since you aren't fighting or fleeing, the energy is vibrating in your muscles.
sensationData.physicalSensation: Restless legs; bouncing knees; tapping fingers; and a feeling of 'electricity' running under the skin.
sensationData.metaphor: A live wire that has fallen on the ground—sparking and jumping with energy that has no grounded destination.
sensationData.theImpulse: To pace the room, to bite your nails, to check your phone every 5 seconds, and to move without purpose.
sensationData.superpower: Ready-For-Action. You are primed. If a real emergency happened right now, you would be the first person to move.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: The 'buzz' is making you feel anxious internally. Goal: Directing the Spark.
pathA.body: Do 20 jumping jacks or a quick set of push-ups. Give that 'twitch' a job to do.
pathA.mind: Count the rhythm of your own tapping. 1-2-3-4, 1-2-3-4.
pathA.social: Hum a fast, rhythmic tune. Let the vibration of the humming match the vibration in your body.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside

pathB.mind: Focus on a single, repetitive visual task, like sorting coins or arranging pens.
pathB.social: Text a friend a funny, high-energy GIF to 'send' some of that jittery energy away.

sensationData.title: Surging
sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you feel a surge. Something unexpected just happened, and your system has 'spiked' its energy to meet the new information. You are in a state of high-alert appraisal.
sensationData.blueprint: Acute Orientation Response. Your system is rapidly shifting gears to assess if a new stimulus is a threat or an opportunity, resulting in a sudden sympathetic surge.
sensationData.physicalSensation: A sudden 'gasp' or sharp inhale; wide eyes; a cold chill running down the spine; and a momentary 'freeze' followed by a racing heart.
sensationData.metaphor: A power surge in a building during a lightning storm—the lights flicker brightly for a second before the breakers reset.

sensationData.superpower: Instant Adaptation. Your system just gave you a massive boost of awareness so you can survive the next 5 seconds, no matter what happens.
sensationData.generalGoal: Stabilizing the current. Slowing the return.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: The internal 'spike' feels overwhelming. Goal: Slow Exhale.
pathA.body: The Long Exhale. Inhale for 3 seconds, then exhale through pursed lips for a count of 8. Repeat 3 times.
pathA.mind: Name the Fact. Say out loud: 'That was a surprise, and I am safe right now.'
pathA.social: The Hand-on-Belly. Place your hand on your stomach and wait until you can feel it move with your breath again.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside

pathB.social: Reach out and touch a solid object (a desk, a wall). Feel its coldness and stability.

sensationData.blueprint: Thermal sympathetic activation. Your metabolic rate has spiked to generate heat and power, preparing your body for a high-intensity defense.

sensationData.superpower: Pure Vitality. You have the energy of a star. When cooled slightly, this is the power of absolute conviction and boundary setting.

pathA.goal: The fire is consuming you from within. Goal: Cool the Core.

pathA.mind: Visualize a blue, cool mist entering your lungs with every inhale.
pathA.social: Text a trusted person: 'Running hot. Need a moment of cool silence.'

pathB.social: Step away into a cooler room or out into the fresh air to change the 'thermal' environment.

pathA.mind: Imagine a pressure valve on top of your head slowly opening and letting out a steady stream of steam.
pathA.social: Identify the 'Why'. Say out loud: 'I am furious because [X] mattered to me.'

pathB.mind: Look at a clock with a second hand and match your finger-tapping to the steady 'tick'.
pathB.social: Ask a safe person for a 'High-Five'—the physical impact helps discharge the boiling point.

sensationData.validation: It makes sense that you are clenched. Your system has hardened your exterior to protect your vulnerability. You are a fortress under siege.

intensityTheory.metaphor: An engine revving at 7,000 RPM while the wheels are locked in concrete, or a high-pressure pipe with all the valves welded shut.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To completely freeze, stop breathing, disconnect from your body, or submit.
intensityTheory.superpower: The ultimate pain-killer. Your nervous system brilliantly immobilized you so you would not draw the attention of a predator, while simultaneously flooding you with endorphins so you won't feel the pain of an inescapable attack.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Sensory ignition. Micro-sparks only. Discharge the Lock. Do not try to relax or use logic. You must mechanically burn off the chemical lock to release the brake.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Your body is locked in high muscular tension, fighting its own internal adrenaline dump. Goal: Physical Discharge.
pathA.body: The Shake. Stand up (or stay seated) and violently shake your hands, arms, legs, and torso for 60 seconds. (Animals do this naturally after a threat passes).
pathA.mind: The Exhale Hum. Take a deep breath and make a low, deep, vibrating 'Vooooo' or humming sound until you are completely out of air.
pathA.social: Silent Connection. Look at a photo of a trusted person or pet. Acknowledge their existence without needing anything from you right now.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are the 'deer in headlights,' terrified and frozen by an external threat. Goal: Auditory Orienting.
pathB.body: Cut the Visual. Close your eyes completely or cover them with your hands.
pathB.mind: Sound Anchoring. With your eyes closed, focus 100% of your attention on finding one safe, rhythmic sound in the room.
pathB.social: The Lighthouse. If you are with someone in the Purple Zone: Do not demand eye contact. Sit quietly beside them.

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary. As the 'Freeze' melts, you will likely feel the 'Fight/Flight' (Red) agitation that was trapped underneath.

intensityTheory.sensations: Hibernating, Immobilized, Hollow, Empty, Deflated, Frozen, Shutdown, Numb, Drained, Lethargic
intensityTheory.emotions: Despairing, Hopeless, Desolate, Spent, Drained, Despondent, Depressed, Sullen, Exhausted
intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that you feel shut down or depleted. Your body is in energy-conserving stasis.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Everything feels voided out, senses numb, motivation evaporated.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: A profound, immovable heaviness, a drop in body temperature, or the literal feeling of an empty chest cavity.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A dried-up riverbed where everything has gone dormant to survive the cold.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To fade away, become completely invisible, and detach.
intensityTheory.superpower: Total metabolic conservation. Your system masterfully strips away all excess to preserve core vitality.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Sensory ignition. Micro-sparks only. No heavy cognitive lifting when the tank is completely empty.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel consumed by an internal void, a crushing heaviness, or total depletion. Goal: Pull OUT to the world.
pathA.body: Friction Spark. Press your palms together firmly and feel the heat generate between them.
pathA.mind: Visual Tether. Name 3 things in the room that have the same color.
pathA.social: Silent Connection. Look at a photo of a trusted person or pet.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You perceive a drained, colorless world. You are spaced out, foggy, or staring blankly. Goal: Pull IN to the body.
pathB.body: Sensory Shock. Take three sharp, fast inhales through the nose, or splash cold water on your face/wrists.
pathB.mind: Internal Tracing. Close your eyes and mentally trace the shape of your right hand.
pathB.social: The Container. Place your right hand firmly on your left shoulder, and your left hand on your right shoulder (a self-hug).

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Blue Zone can feel scary. As the 'Freeze' melts, you will likely feel the 'Fight/Flight' (Red) agitation.

intensityTheory.sensations: Disconnected, Collapsed, Withdrawn, Sinking, Exhausted, Fading, Slumped, Shrinking, Heavy, Flat
intensityTheory.emotions: Alienated, Miserable, Lonely, Disheartened, Tired, Pessimistic, Morose, Discouraged, Sad, Bored
intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that you feel heavy and withdrawn. You are not lazy; your system is signaling that the cost of engaging is too high right now.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Your system is powering down. The thinking brain is flickering, and complex logic is becoming difficult.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: A deep, aching heaviness in the limbs and chest. Slumped posture and mental fogginess.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A thick fog rolling in that obscures the landscape.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To cancel plans, pull the covers over your head, and avoid eye contact.
intensityTheory.superpower: Strategic retreat. Your system is intentionally dimming the lights to protect you.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Gentle Mobilization. Simple physical movements combined with simple mental focus to slowly bring the system back online.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel consumed by the internal heaviness and the urge to slump inward. Goal: Pull OUT to the world.
pathA.body: Postural Reset. Sit up straight, physically lift your chin, and roll your shoulders back.
pathA.mind: The 5-Object Anchor. Name 5 things you can see around you right now.
pathA.social: Low-Stakes Signal. Send a single emoji to a trusted friend.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels muffled, distant, or overwhelming. Goal: Pull IN to the body.
pathB.body: Tactile Grounding. Rub your hands firmly up and down your thighs.
pathB.mind: Internal Pulse. Tap your finger against your leg to the exact rhythm of your own heartbeat.
pathB.social: The Lighthouse Request. Ask a safe person to simply sit near you while you read or rest.

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Blue Zone can feel scary.

intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that your system is slowing down. Your body is simply pausing to protect its resources.
intensityTheory.blueprint: A mild energy drop, gently turning down your metabolic rate. Your thinking brain is still fully online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: A slight loss of physical sharpness, a drooping posture, and muffled senses.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A dimmer switch gently turning down the lights in a room.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To sigh, step back, and passively withdraw.
intensityTheory.superpower: The pause. Allows you to stop expending energy on something that isn't working.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel the physical sluggishness. Goal: Shift the internal narrative and wake the body.
pathA.body: The Posture Signal. Stand up, stretch overhead, and take one deep, deliberate breath.
pathA.mind: Cognitive Reframing. Tell yourself out loud: 'I am hitting a speed bump, not a wall.'
pathA.social: The Casual Check-In. Send a quick message to a friend about something unrelated.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The environment feels a bit dull. Goal: Re-anchor to the present moment.
pathB.body: Sensory Focus. Hold a warm cup of tea, focusing entirely on the physical temperature.
pathB.mind: The Curiosity Lens. Pick one mundane object and find three interesting details.
pathB.social: Listening. Ask someone nearby a simple question and focus 100% on their answer.

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Blue Zone can feel scary.

intensityTheory.sensations: Exploding, Flooded, Overloaded, Twitchy, Surging, Burning, Boiling, Clenched, Braced, Racing
intensityTheory.emotions: Enraged, Panicked, Stressed, Jittery, Shocked, Livid, Furious, Frustrated, Tense, Stunned
intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that you feel explosive. Your body is flawlessly executing an ancient survival protocol.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Adrenaline flood. The amygdala has shut down the thinking brain to prioritize survival.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Pounding heart, rapid shallow breathing, heat in the face, clenched muscles.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A raging forest fire or a car engine redlining.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To explode, attack, scream, or immediately flee.
intensityTheory.superpower: Ultimate physical mobilization to survive a predator.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Mechanical Braking & Energy Discharge. Use the body to cool the engine.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are consumed by intense heat and racing heart. Goal: Cool the engine.
pathA.body: Physiological Sigh. Two sharp inhales through the nose, one long exhale through the mouth.
pathA.mind: Visual Broaden. Look up and take in the far edges of the room (panoramic vision).
pathA.social: The Safe Exit. State: 'My system is running hot, I need to step away for a few minutes.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are hyper-fixated on the trigger. Goal: Break the threat-lock and discharge energy.
pathB.body: Heavy Resistance. Push against a solid wall as hard as you can for 10 seconds.
pathB.mind: Neutral Anchor. Find 5 objects of the same color and say names out loud.
pathB.social: The Vent Valve. Ask a safe person to simply listen without giving advice.

intensityTheory.warning: What do you want to achieve? Do you want to use the energy? Then steer to yellow. Do you want to relax? Calm down into green.

intensityTheory.sensations: Volatile, Trembling, Pressurized, Vibrating, Fidgety, Pounding, Guarded, Scanning, Flushed, Prickly
intensityTheory.emotions: Fuming, Frightened, Angry, Nervous, Restless, Anxious, Apprehensive, Worried, Irritated, Annoyed
intensityTheory.validation: It makes perfect sense that you feel pressurized. Your body is gathering fuel to handle a challenge.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Rising adrenaline. Thinking brain is flickering—complex logic is difficult.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Heavy heartbeat, tight jaw, buzzing energy in the limbs.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To snap, argue, pace, or aggressively fix a problem.
intensityTheory.superpower: Focused Mobilization to decisively handle a challenge.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are consumed by buzzing, restless energy. Goal: Release the pressure.
pathA.body: Active Release. Shake out your hands vigorously as if flicking water off fingertips.
pathA.mind: Name to Tame. Say out loud: 'My engine is running hot right now.'
pathA.social: The Boundary Signal. State: 'I'm feeling a bit overwhelmed, need to focus on one thing at a time.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are hyper-focused on an annoyance. Goal: Break the target-lock.
pathB.body: Rhythmic Pacing. Take 10 slow, deliberate steps, counting each one.
pathB.mind: Visual Shift. Name 3 things in the room that are neutral or boring.
pathB.social: The Mirror Ask. Ask a safe person to talk about something totally unrelated.

intensityTheory.warning: What do you want to achieve? Do you want to use the energy? Then steer to yellow. Do you want to relax? Calm down into green.

intensityTheory.validation: Your body is giving you a small injection of fuel to deal with a minor challenge.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Mild fight/flight response. Thinking brain is fully online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Subtle tightening of shoulders or jaw, slight quickening of breath.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A yellow traffic light or an engine in first gear.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To fidget, speak sharply, or overthink.
intensityTheory.superpower: The early warning system to notice a boundary violation.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel subtle physical tension. Goal: Steer the narrative and use the fuel.
pathA.body: Forward Ambulation. Take a 2-minute walk to quiet the brain's threat detector.
pathA.mind: Stress is Fuel Reframe. Say: 'My body is giving me the energy I need to handle this.'
pathA.social: The Reality Check. Ask a safe person: 'Am I reading this situation right?'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Hyper-focusing on a minor annoyance. Goal: Right-size the problem.
pathB.body: The Exhale Focus. Take a breath in, and extend the exhale to be longer than inhale.
pathB.mind: The Empathy Pivot. Invent one benign, harmless reason for someone's annoying behavior.
pathB.social: The Collaborative Ask. State: 'I'm finding this a bit frustrating—can we brainstorm a different way?'

intensityTheory.warning: What do you want to achieve? Do you want to use the energy? Then steer to yellow. Do you want to relax? Calm down into green.

intensityTheory.sensations: Slowing, Grounded, Quiet, Warm, Still, Loose, Steady, Stable, Settled, Light
intensityTheory.emotions: Sleepy, Complacent, Tranquil, Cozy, Serene, Mellow, Thoughtful, Peaceful, Comfortable, Carefree
intensityTheory.validation: Your nervous system is performing critical repairs and refilling your body budget.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Vagal Brake is fully engaged. Body is in physiological safety.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Pleasant heaviness, unclenched muscles, effortless breathing.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A high-performance car parked in the garage for a tune-up.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To sleep, cuddle, reflect, or simply exist.
intensityTheory.superpower: Deep Restoration. Biologically building structural capacity to handle future stress.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Savoring internal stillness. Goal: Deep Rest & Repair.
pathA.body: Conscious Surrender (NSDR). Do a 10-minute body scan.
pathA.mind: Savoring the Baseline. Explicitly memorize the feeling: 'This is what safety feels like.'
pathA.social: Safe Solitude. Give yourself permission to be alone without guilt.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Feeling tranquil and safe in environment. Goal: Deep Connection.
pathB.body: Regulating Touch. Cuddle a pet or wrap yourself in a heavy blanket.
pathB.mind: The Gratitude Anchor. Recognize why you are grateful for something nearby.
pathB.social: The Lighthouse. Offer your calm presence to someone else without talking.

intensityTheory.sensations: Resting, Calm, Restoring, Present, Balanced, Smooth, Anchored, Satisfied, Expanding, Softening
intensityTheory.emotions: Relaxed, Chill, Restful, Blessed, Balanced, Calm, Secure, Satisfied, Grateful, Touched
intensityTheory.validation: Your environment is safe; your system is down-shifting to prepare for connection.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Transitioning to safety. Heart rate is slowing; social engagement is coming online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Muscles unclenching, posture relaxing, open engagement.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A ship dropping anchor in a calm harbor.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To sigh in relief, smile gently, or appreciate the environment.
intensityTheory.superpower: Co-Regulation. You have the power to help others feel calm just by being in the room.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Enjoying internal calm, want to gently connect. Goal: Gentle External Connection.
pathA.body: The Half-Smile. Intentionally create a gentle 'Mona Lisa' smile.
pathA.mind: Savoring the Shift. Mentally name three things in your body that feel 'not wrong.'
pathA.social: The Casual Bid. Make a low-stakes observation to someone nearby.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Feeling open-hearted and engaged. Goal: Deepen the Social Anchor.
pathB.body: The Extended Exhale. Let the exhale be longer than the inhale.
pathB.mind: Hunting for Glimmers. Find one tiny specific detail that brings micro-joy.
pathB.social: Prosodic Listening. Focus on the melodic tone of a human voice.

intensityTheory.emotions: At Ease, Easygoing, Content, Loving, Fulfilled
intensityTheory.validation: Your nervous system has assessed you are safe. You are mastering your gears.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Deceleration. Amygdala is quiet; prefrontal cortex is fully online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Momentum slowing without crashing. Grounded feet, rhythmic breathing.
intensityTheory.metaphor: Shifting off a busy highway onto a scenic neighborhood road.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To look around the room and take a deep clarifying breath.
intensityTheory.superpower: Smooth Transitions. Clarity to purposefully choose your next move.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Feeling the internal shift of engine slowing. Goal: Deepen the Anchor.
pathA.body: The Gravity Check. Press your feet into the floor and feel the support.
pathA.mind: The Transition Label. Tell yourself: 'I am safely shifting gears.'
pathA.social: The Inner Circle. Spend 30 seconds visualizing the face of a secure person.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Highly present in environment. Goal: Active Appreciation.
pathB.body: Visual Broadening. Let your eyes wander and rest on whatever is naturally pleasing.
pathB.mind: Micro-Gratitude. Identify one small thing that is working perfectly.
pathB.social: The Just Because Bid. Send a quick message to a friend requiring no response.

intensityTheory.sensations: Widening, Lifted, Bubbling, Electric, Soaring, Buzzing, Bright, Pulsing, Flowing, Buoyant
intensityTheory.emotions: Surprised, Upbeat, Festive, Exhilarated, Ecstatic, Hyper, Cheerful, Motivated, Inspired, Elated
intensityTheory.validation: Your body has successfully married peak energy with profound safety.
intensityTheory.blueprint: The ultimate hybrid state: high-octane energy with the safety circuit firmly engaged.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Buzzing electric energy, weightlessness, wide and bright eyes.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A race car on an open track or a surfer on a massive wave.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To create, celebrate, and lose yourself in a challenging task.
intensityTheory.superpower: The Generative Drive. The biological home of 'Flow.'

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Bubbling internal energy, need to point at a target. Goal: Channel the Drive.
pathA.body: Dynamic Discharge. Jump, dance, or shadowbox for 60 seconds.
pathA.mind: The North Star. Declare out loud: 'I am using this energy to build [X].'
pathA.social: The Spark Bid. Share excitement: 'I have so much energy, want to go do [X]?'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Completely absorbed in a task or project. Goal: Maintain the Safety Anchor.
pathB.body: The Smile Check. Deliberately make a genuine smile while working at speed.
pathB.mind: Friction Reframing. Say: 'This frustration is just the friction of learning.'
pathB.social: Team Flow. High-five a partner or explicitly acknowledge a shared win.

intensityTheory.sensations: Awake, Vital, Eager, Expansive, Humming, Engaged, Locked In, Glowing, Elevated, Tingling
intensityTheory.emotions: Energized, Lively, Excited, Optimistic, Enthusiastic, Pleased, Focused, Happy, Proud, Thrilled
intensityTheory.validation: Your body is providing fuel to pursue your goals and interact safely.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Steady stream of dopamine. Prefrontal cortex is fully online for deep work.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Physical readiness, upright posture, heart rate elevated but steady.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A sailor catching a perfect steady wind.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To build, learn, focus deeply, and collaborate.
intensityTheory.superpower: Sustained Generative Drive. Motivation fueled by creation, not survival.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Internal drive, humming with optimism. Goal: Apply the Drive.
pathA.body: The Posture of Pride. Stand tall, lift your chest, take an energizing breath.
pathA.mind: The Get To Reframe. List three things you 'get to' do with this energy.
pathA.social: The Enthusiasm Share. Reach out to a friend to share good news or a win.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Highly absorbed and dialed in. Goal: Sustain the Flow.
pathB.body: Rhythmic Movement. Pacing while thinking or squeezing a stress ball.
pathB.mind: The Micro-Milestone. Break task into tiny goal; acknowledge when complete.
pathB.social: Collaborative Building. Ask someone for input or brainstorm together.

intensityTheory.validation: Your body is providing a safe, low-dose spark to explore and learn.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Vagal brake released slightly. Social engagement looking for fun.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Light bubbling in the chest, lifting posture, urge to explore.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A puppy waking from a nap and noticing a favorite toy.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To joke, ask a curious question, or gently engage.
intensityTheory.superpower: Curiosity & Micro-Play. State for tinkering without pressure.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Hopeful swelling of energy inside. Goal: Express the Spark.
pathA.body: The Light Bounce. Tap feet to a beat or gently bounce on toes.
pathA.mind: The What If? Game. Ask: 'What if I tried this task in a new way?'
pathA.social: The Playful Bid. Send a funny meme or share a curious thought.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Drawn to something fun or vibrant. Goal: Engage Curiosity.
pathB.body: Tactile Tinkering. Manipulate a physical object while you think.
pathB.mind: Sensory Savoring. Notice three visually pleasing things in environment.
pathB.social: The Curious Question. Ask someone: 'What are you most excited about today?'
